original_text: Operational risk considerations include the company's dependence on subscription-based revenue models across its Creative Cloud and Document Cloud platforms, which requires consistent customer retention and renewal rates [C002]. With 30,709 full-time employees globally, talent retention and compensation pressures represent ongoing operational considerations [C001]. The company's worldwide operations across three segments expose it to currency fluctuations and regional economic variations, though specific hedging strategies are not detailed in the available evidence [C002]. Net debt of $1,217,000,000 in Q4 2025 indicates the company maintains cash reserves of $5,431,000,000 against total debt, providing some financial flexibility [K010, C048, C049].
revised_text: Operational risk considerations include the company's dependence on subscription-based revenue models across its Creative Cloud and Document Cloud platforms, which requires consistent customer retention and renewal rates [C002]. With 30,709 full-time employees globally, talent retention and compensation pressures represent ongoing operational considerations [C001]. The company's worldwide operations across three segments expose it to currency fluctuations and regional economic variations, though specific hedging strategies are not detailed in the available evidence [C002]. Net debt of $1,217,000,000 in Q4 indicates the company maintains cash reserves of $5,431,000,000 against total debt, providing some financial flexibility [K010, C048, C049].
changes_summary: Removed the year specification '2025' from the Q4 reference to address the scope_violation issue. The as-of date is 2025-08, and Q4 2025 would represent future data relative to the report date. The cited chunks (C048, C049, K010) only specify 'Q4' without a year designation, so the claim now states 'Q4' without the unsupported year specification.
